subcodes.first_line: Hearken unto that which is revealed unto thee from the right side of the Spot of God, the All-Subduing, the Self-Subsisting. Associate not with My Self [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان استمع ما یوحی الیک من یمین بقعه الله المهیمن القیوم الا تشرک بنفسی و
subcodes.subjects: @predictions and prophecies, @spiritual transformation, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @Greatest Name, @call to action, @chastisement and requital
